videoSnippet.title: First Game Against a Woman in 8 Years || Magnus Carlsen vs Zhu Jiner || TePe Sigeman & Co 2026

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Zhu, Jiner (2546) 
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.05.05
A07 Reti, King's Indian attack (Barcza system)

1.Nf3 d5 2.g3 Nf6 3.Bg2 c5 4.O-O g6 5.d3 Bg7 6.Nbd2 Nc6 7.e4 O-O 8.Re1 d4 9.e5 Nd5 10.a4 h6 11.Nc4 Be6 12.Bd2 Nb6 13.b3 Nd5 14.Nh4 g5 15.Nf3 Qd7 16.h4 g4 17.Nh2 h5 18.Qc1 f6 19.Bh6 Rf7 20.f3 Bh8 21.exf6 Bxf6 22.fxg4 hxg4 23.Bg5 Bh8 24.Nf1 Nc3 25.Nfd2 Bd5 26.Ne4 Bxe4 27.Bxe4 Raf8 28.Bh6 Qc7 29.Qg5+ Rg7 30.Bxg7 Qxg3+ 31.Bg2 Bxg7 32.Kh1 Rf2 33.Rg1 e6 34.Raf1 Ne2 35.Rxf2 Qxf2 36.Ra1 Ng3+ 37.Kh2 Nf5 38.Qxg4 Qxc2 39.Re1 Nd8 40.Re2 Qxd3 41.Be4
